title: V01 Implementation Roadmap Source of Truth

governing_stages.title: Panchang, Festival and Vedic Guidance Implementation Readiness
governing_stages.objective: Consume existing methodology/governance and prepare safe V01 public preview integration.

governing_stages.title: Word of the Day and Reflection Implementation Readiness
governing_stages.objective: Consume existing Word bank and reflection/governance logic for V01 homepage integration.

governing_stages.title: User Accounts and Personalisation Readiness
governing_stages.objective: Preserve future personalisation path while keeping V01 static/GitHub-first and privacy-safe.

governing_stages.title: Psychometric and Assessment Product Governance Scaffold
governing_stages.objective: Document assessment product scaffold/governance only; do not activate public assessment in V01.

governing_stages.title: Analytics, Monitoring and Editorial Dashboard Planning
governing_stages.objective: Define monitoring and dashboards for editorial/module health without enabling runtime queries.

governing_stages.title: Security, Privacy, Source, Legal and Compliance Hardening
governing_stages.objective: Consolidate secret safety, source doctrine, legal disclaimers, privacy and backend/Auth deferral.

governing_stages.title: Performance, SEO, Accessibility and Mobile QA
governing_stages.objective: Validate public quality and discoverability for V01 surfaces.

governing_stages.title: Backup, Rollback, Migration and Release Operations
governing_stages.objective: Create operational safety before V01 release candidate freeze.

governing_stages.title: Version 01 Release Candidate Freeze, Completed-Stack Reconciliation and Final Audit
governing_stages.objective: Freeze V01 scope and reconcile every completed repo stream before AG56.

governing_stages.title: Version 01 Controlled Dynamic Content Loop Test and Go-Live
governing_stages.objective: Run one controlled end-to-end V01 content loop, then decide go-live.

governing_rule: Do not move Panchang/Festival/Vedic work to AG48.
AG48 remains Word of the Day and Reflection.
AG49 remains User Accounts and Personalisation.
AG50 remains Psychometric and Assessment Product Governance Scaffold.
AG55 remains Version 01 Release Candidate Freeze and Final Audit.
AG56 remains controlled dynamic content loop test and go-live decision.
